entities.name: APROAEREMA MODICELLA
entities.description: The groundnut leaf miner, an insect that causes outbreaks on groundnut crops.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop affected by the Aproaerema modicella outbreak.

entities.name: NORTHERN MALAWI
entities.description: The geographical region where the outbreak of Aproaerema modicella was recorded.

entities.name: OUTBREAK
entities.description: The sudden occurrence and increase of Aproaerema modicella populations.

entities.name: DAMAGE SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The physical manifestations of damage on the plant caused by the leaf miner.

entities.name: ALTERNATIVE HOST PLANTS
entities.description: Other plant species capable of hosting the Aproaerema modicella.
